attributes.name: [Anthropic] Cost Anomaly
attributes.description: Alerts when daily cost exceeds a configurable threshold. Catches unexpected spend spikes from runaway workloads or new model adoption before they accumulate.

investigation_guide.blob:
## Cost Anomaly

### Triage Steps
1. Open the Cost & Billing dashboard and review the daily cost trend.
2. Identify which models and workspaces are contributing most to the spike using the cost breakdown panels.
3. Cross-reference with the Token Usage dashboard to see if the cost spike correlates with a token usage spike.
4. Check `anthropic.cost.cost_type` to determine whether the cost is from tokens, web search, or code execution.
5. Review `anthropic.cost.workspace_id` to identify the responsible team or project.

### Common Causes
- Unexpected increase in API call volume from a new feature or workload
- Switch to a more expensive model (e.g., from Haiku to Opus)
- Web search or code execution features enabled without cost awareness
- Batch processing jobs running without rate limiting

### Tuning
- Adjust the `5000` cent threshold ($50) in the WHERE clause to match your organization's daily budget.
- Consider using the Per-Workspace Daily Cost Spike alert for finer-grained workspace-level monitoring.
